slots.name: Engineering
slots.description: Engineering implementation, release, and operations work

workstreams.name: Production Deployment
workstreams.description: Production rollout, monitoring, and rollback planning

turns.content: Use a blue-green production deployment and preserve the previous environment until validation completes.
The rollback trigger is two consecutive failed health-check windows.
Run schema compatibility and smoke tests in staging before promotion.
The vendor agreement requires thirty days notice for termination.
